name: ai-config-sync-manager
description: Open-source Codex plugin for syncing AI assistant configuration through the ai-config-sync CLI.

interface.shortDescription: OSS config sync for Codex and Claude.
interface.longDescription: Open-source helper plugin that delegates connect, status, and sync workflows to the ai-config-sync CLI with dry-run-first behavior, backups, and manual confirmation for risky changes.
defaultPrompt: Connect Codex and Claude config sync.
